stereotype: «Engine» — pure, deterministic; encapsulates InterventionPolicy volatility; Strategy host; imports no Temporal; cross-Manager (3 callers)
volatility: InterventionPolicy (volatilities.md axis 1 — same customer over time) — what counts as stuck, who is notified, when a human is paged, and what authority they have to override. Trigger surface: construction variance, operated-app health changes, settlement failures, operator pause. Decision rule evolves (early: every variance → single operator; later: severity tiers, SLA classes, self-healing rules).

ops.stereotype: pure compute — plain deterministic Go function; no Activity wrapper; no Temporal
ops.note: Given a detected construction variance (failed review, worker miss, estimate over-run), returns Retry | Escalate | Takeover per the project's InterventionPolicy.

fields.name: Variance
fields.note: ConstructionVariance struct { ProjectID ProjectID; ActivityID ActivityID; Kind VarianceKind; AttemptCount int; Severity Severity; Policy InterventionPolicy }

fields.name: Directive
fields.note: VarianceDirective int — VarianceRetry | VarianceEscalate | VarianceTakeover; closed enum per DSL line 307/551

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: ContractMisuse (nil/invalid variance or policy) | UnknownPolicyMode (policy references InterventionMode build lacks; no silent fallback) | InternalInvariant (strategy returned out-of-closed-set directive)

ops.stereotype: pure compute — plain deterministic Go function; no Activity wrapper; no Temporal
ops.note: Given an observed health/SLO transition on an operated app, returns Retry (self-heal/re-observe) | Escalate (page operator).

fields.name: HealthChange
fields.note: HealthChange struct { OperatedAppID OperatedAppID; FromHealth HealthStatus; ToHealth HealthStatus; SLOStatus SLOStatus; Policy InterventionPolicy }

fields.name: Directive
fields.note: HealthDirective int — HealthRetry | HealthEscalate; closed enum per DSL line 309/589 (no Takeover)

ops.stereotype: pure compute — plain deterministic Go function; no Activity wrapper; no Temporal
ops.note: Given a failed settlement action (declined charge, dispute, chargeback), returns Retry | Delay (back off to next shortfallSweep under BillingTerms grace) | Escalate (tolerance exhausted).

fields.name: Failure
fields.note: SettlementFailure struct { CustomerID CustomerID; CycleID CycleID; Kind SettlementFailureKind; AttemptCount int; ShortfallAge int; Policy InterventionPolicy } — BillingTerms tolerance rides inside Policy

fields.name: Directive
fields.note: SettlementFailureDirective int — SettlementRetry | SettlementDelay | SettlementEscalate; iota ordering is Engine-internal, not a wire contract (freeze-time amendment)

ops.stereotype: pure compute — plain deterministic Go function; no Activity wrapper; no Temporal
ops.note: Given an operator pause request, returns a PausePlan (which pipelines to cancel, whether to recordOperatorPaused, who to notify, resume hint); Manager executes the plan.

fields.name: Ctx
fields.note: PauseRequestContext struct { ProjectID ProjectID; InFlightPipelines []PipelineRef; Reason string; Policy InterventionPolicy }

fields.name: NotifyTargets
fields.note: who the policy says to notify (operator / architect / none)

fields.name: ResumeHint
fields.note: grace/resume guidance the policy attaches; no clock read

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: ContractMisuse (empty projectId; nil in-flight snapshot or policy) | UnknownPolicyMode | InternalInvariant

dataContracts: InterventionPolicy struct { Mode InterventionMode, SLATier, RetryBudget int /+ severity-tier thresholds, paging targets, shortfall-tolerance/ }
ConstructionVariance struct { ProjectID, ActivityID, Kind VarianceKind, AttemptCount int, Severity, Policy InterventionPolicy }
HealthChange struct { OperatedAppID, FromHealth HealthStatus, ToHealth HealthStatus, SLOStatus, Policy InterventionPolicy }

SettlementFailure struct { CustomerID, CycleID, Kind SettlementFailureKind, AttemptCount int, ShortfallAge int, Policy InterventionPolicy } // BillingTerms tolerance rides inside Policy (OQ-3 ratified)
PauseRequestContext struct { ProjectID, InFlightPipelines []PipelineRef, Reason string, Policy InterventionPolicy }
VarianceDirective int // VarianceRetry | VarianceEscalate | VarianceTakeover — closed enum per DSL line 307/551
HealthDirective int // HealthRetry | HealthEscalate — closed enum per DSL line 309/589 (no Takeover)
SettlementFailureDirective int // SettlementRetry | SettlementDelay | SettlementEscalate — iota ordering is Engine-internal, not a wire contract (freeze-time amendment)
PausePlan struct { PipelinesToCancel []PipelineRef, RecordPaused bool, NotifyTargets []NotifyTarget, ResumeHint }
errorModel: framework-go/engine.Error — ContractMisuse (nil inputs; empty projectId; input missing kind/attempt policy keys on) | UnknownPolicyMode (policy references InterventionMode/Strategy the running build lacks; no silent fallback — intervening under wrong policy on broken build/failed money path is the correctness hazard) | InternalInvariant (strategy returned a directive outside the op's closed set). No InvalidInput (no parse step). No retryable flag; all errors are programmer errors.
idempotency: Trivially idempotent for all four ops — pure functions; identical inputs → identical directive/plan; no side effects; no idempotencyKey.

revisions.summary: New contract for existing Engine; 4 ops from four DSL edge labels across 3 callers; Engine decides/Manager executes discipline; zero outbound edges; no interventionEngine→handOffEngine edge; applyPausePolicy held in same facet as trouble-triggered ops (OQ-1); per-op directive enums (OQ-2); by-value inputs (OQ-3); OQ-4..6 drafted.

APPROVE-AND-FREEZE: 9/9 PASS, 0 WAIVED, 0 FAIL. Three callers/four ops/zero outbound edges independently re-derived in DSL. NCUC5 delinquency enforcement confirmed does NOT route through this Engine. OQ-1 one-contract confirmed; OQ-2 per-op enums confirmed; OQ-3 by-value homing ratified + BillingTerms rides inside InterventionPolicy; OQ-4 ContractMisuse+UnknownPolicyMode+InternalInvariant ratified; OQ-5 HealthDirective {Retry|Escalate} only confirmed; OQ-6 field shapes construction-refinable. Freeze-time editorial amendment: SettlementFailureDirective iota ordering pinned as Engine-internal (not a wire contract). 4 non-blocking follow-ups to C-IE.
